title.en: Design: From Assumptions to Testable Hypotheses
title.zh: 设计：从假设到可验证的假说

summary.en: Every business idea rests on untested assumptions. This chapter introduces the experiment design process: identify the riskiest assumptions (those that would kill the idea if false), articulate them as falsifiable hypotheses, choose an experiment type, and define success/failure criteria before running it. A hypothesis you can't falsify isn't an experiment — it's a belief.
summary.zh: 每个商业想法都建立在未经测试的假设之上。本章引入实验设计流程：识别最冒险的假设（如果为假就会杀死想法的那些），将其表达为可证伪的假说，选择实验类型，并在运行之前定义成功/失败标准。一个你没法证伪的假说不是实验——那是信仰。

summary.en: 44 experiment types organized by theme (Discovery vs. Validation), risk tested (Desirability, Feasibility, Viability), cost band, and setup/run time. From cheap discovery tests (customer interviews, search trend analysis) to strong-validation tests (pre-sales, letter-of-intent). Each experiment has a clear 'when to use it' signal, step-by-step recipe, and real-world examples.
summary.zh: 根据主题（发现 vs. 验证）、验证的风险（需求性、可行性、可营性）、成本带和准备/运行时间组织的 44 种实验类型。从廉价的发现测试（客户访谈、搜索趋势分析）到强验证测试（预售、意向书）。每个实验都有清晰的「何时使用」信号、操作步骤和真实案例。

title.en: Evidence: Measuring Learning, Not Just Outcomes
title.zh: 证据：衡量学习，而不只是结果

summary.en: An experiment's output is not just 'pass/fail' — it's evidence strength, learning velocity, and risk reduction. This chapter introduces the Evidence Scorecard: track evidence type (weak/medium/strong), learning per cost unit, remaining risk across D/F/V axes, and portfolio-level decisions (pivot, persevere, or kill). Learning is the currency; evidence is the record.
summary.zh: 一个实验的输出不只是「过/不过」——而是证据强度、学习速度以及风险降低程度。本章引入证据记分卡：追踪证据类型（弱/中/强）、单位成本的学习、需求性/可行性/可营性三个维度上剩余的风险，以及组合层面的决策（转向、坚持或砍掉）。学习是货币，证据是账本。

summary.en: Individual experiments are tactics; a systematic testing discipline is strategy. This chapter covers experiment portfolio management (mixing discovery and validation, balancing D/F/V risk coverage), team rituals (weekly experiment review), leadership stance (rewarding learning, not just winning), and organizational design (separating exploration from exploitation).
summary.zh: 单次实验是战术，体系化的测试纪律是战略。本章涵盖实验组合管理（混合发现与验证、平衡需求性/可行性/可营性风险覆盖）、团队仪式（周实验评审）、领导力姿态（奖励学习而不仅是赢）、组织设计（分离探索与利用）。
